Administrative Officer Job at Sleek Angels International Schools




        
    

        
        Sleek Angels International Schools is located at 30 Rumuevuorlu Rd., Off Miniorlu by Ada George Rd., PortHarcourt, Rivers State Our Vision is To be the foremost citadel of knowledge and excellence in Nigeria.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Administrative Officer

Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers
Job Type: Full time

Requirements
     

            
    




	Applicant must posses a Degree (MSc, BSc, etc) from a recognized university.
	Applicant must have at least 2 years of experience as an administrative officer, etc.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:
The Principal,
Sleek Angels International School,
No 30, Rumeuvuorlu Road. off Ada George,
Port Harcourt,
Rivers State.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "description": "Sunrise is a subsidiary of Bond Group of Companies situated in Ibadan, Oyo State with business interest in supermarket, pharmacy, eatery and arcade.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Account Officer&nbsp;

Job Location: Bodija, Ibadan - Oyo
Employment Type: Full-time

Summary of Responsibilities


	Assist in the preparation of financial statements and management accounts.
	Maintain all accounting records.
	Carry out daily reconciliation of all sales proceeds i.e. cash or electronic payment to ensure the correctness of all transactions.
	Carry out on-the-spot assessment of the Cashiers to ensure the accuracy of their transactions.
	Keep a record of all accounting transactions.
	Carry out weekly stock reconciliation etc.
	Carry out daily reconciliation of all sales lodgments i.e. cash or electronic payment to ensure the correctness of all transactions.


Academic Qualification and Skills


	HND/B.Sc. in Accounting or related field with a minimum of 2 years of working experience on the job.
	Ability to work with less supervision.
	Attention to details and good record management.
	Familiar with Tally or any accounting packages.
	Computer savvy and familiar with Microsoft Office etc.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their detailed CV to: love.samuel@bondpharm.com or career.rear01@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Account Officer Job at Sunrise Universal Integrated Supermarket




        
    

        
        Sunrise is a subsidiary of Bond Group of Companies situated in Ibadan, Oyo State with business interest in supermarket, pharmacy, eatery and arcade.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Account Officer 

Job Location: Bodija, Ibadan - Oyo
Employment Type: Full-time

Summary of Responsibilities
     

            
    




	Assist in the preparation of financial statements and management accounts.
	Maintain all accounting records.
	Carry out daily reconciliation of all sales proceeds i.e. cash or electronic payment to ensure the correctness of all transactions.
	Carry out on-the-spot assessment of the Cashiers to ensure the accuracy of their transactions.
	Keep a record of all accounting transactions.
	Carry out weekly stock reconciliation etc.
	Carry out daily reconciliation of all sales lodgments i.e. cash or electronic payment to ensure the correctness of all transactions.


Academic Qualification and Skills


	HND/B.Sc. in Accounting or related field with a minimum of 2 years of working experience on the job.
	Ability to work with less supervision.
	Attention to details and good record management.
	Familiar with Tally or any accounting packages.
	Computer savvy and familiar with Microsoft Office etc.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their detailed CV to: [email protected] or [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Senior Facility Manager",
  "description": "Alpha Mead Group is a Total Real Estate Solutions Company established to provide robust business support services to local and international Real Estate investors or owners with interests in Facilities Management, Real Estate Development and Advisory, Security Systems and Technologies, Training, Healthcare Management, and Real Estate Financing Services.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Senior Facility Manager
Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers

Key Responsibilities


	Lead the day-to-day delivery of integrated facility management services across client facilities.
	Manage hard services (electrical, mechanical, HVAC, plumbing, generators, fire protection systems, lifts, building fabric, etc.) and soft services (cleaning, landscaping, pest control, waste management, security coordination, and other support services).
	Ensure compliance with all contractual Service Level Agreements (SLAs), Key Performance Indicators (KPIs), and statutory requirements.
	Develop and implement preventive and predictive maintenance programmes to improve asset reliability and operational efficiency.
	Prepare and manage annual maintenance budgets, monitor costs, and optimize resource utilization.
	Lead multidisciplinary teams, including engineers, supervisors, technicians, and subcontractors, ensuring high performance and accountability.
	Serve as the primary liaison between the company and the client, maintaining strong professional relationships and promptly resolving operational issues.
	Drive continuous improvement initiatives to enhance service quality and customer satisfaction.
	Ensure strict compliance with Health, Safety, Environment (HSE), Quality Management Systems (QMS), and company policies.
	Prepare operational reports, performance dashboards, maintenance schedules, and management presentations.
	Coordinate emergency response activities and business continuity plans.
	Manage contractors and vendors to ensure quality service delivery and contractual compliance.
	Identify operational risks and implement appropriate mitigation measures.


Qualifications


	Bachelor&#39;s Degree in Engineering (Electrical, Mechanical, Civil, or related discipline) or a closely related field.
	9&ndash;12 years of progressive experience in Facility Management, with significant experience managing integrated FM operations for corporate, industrial, or energy-sector clients.
	Demonstrated experience managing large multidisciplinary teams and high-value FM contracts.
	Strong knowledge of building systems, maintenance planning, engineering operations, and asset lifecycle management.
	Excellent leadership, communication, negotiation, and stakeholder management skills.
	Strong commercial awareness with experience managing budgets, contracts, and vendor performance.
	Sound knowledge of HSE standards and regulatory compliance within facility management operations.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite and Computerized Maintenance Management Systems (CMMS).


Professional Certifications:


	COREN registration will be an added advantage.
	IFMA Certification (FMP, SFP, CFM, or equivalent) will be an added advantage
",
  "datePosted": "2026-07-17",
  "validThrough": "2026-08-18",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",
  "hiringOrganization": {
    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "Alpha Mead Group"
    
  },
  "jobLocation": {
    "@type": "Place",
    "address": {
      "@type": "PostalAddress",
       "postalCode": ". ",

Senior Facility Manager Job at Alpha Mead Group




        
    

        
        Alpha Mead Group is a Total Real Estate Solutions Company established to provide robust business support services to local and international Real Estate investors or owners with interests in Facilities Management, Real Estate Development and Advisory, Security Systems and Technologies, Training, Healthcare Management, and Real Estate Financing Services.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Senior Facility Manager
Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers

Key Responsibilities
     

            
    




	Lead the day-to-day delivery of integrated facility management services across client facilities.
	Manage hard services (electrical, mechanical, HVAC, plumbing, generators, fire protection systems, lifts, building fabric, etc.) and soft services (cleaning, landscaping, pest control, waste management, security coordination, and other support services).
	Ensure compliance with all contractual Service Level Agreements (SLAs), Key Performance Indicators (KPIs), and statutory requirements.
	Develop and implement preventive and predictive maintenance programmes to improve asset reliability and operational efficiency.
	Prepare and manage annual maintenance budgets, monitor costs, and optimize resource utilization.
	Lead multidisciplinary teams, including engineers, supervisors, technicians, and subcontractors, ensuring high performance and accountability.
	Serve as the primary liaison between the company and the client, maintaining strong professional relationships and promptly resolving operational issues.
	Drive continuous improvement initiatives to enhance service quality and customer satisfaction.
	Ensure strict compliance with Health, Safety, Environment (HSE), Quality Management Systems (QMS), and company policies.
	Prepare operational reports, performance dashboards, maintenance schedules, and management presentations.
	Coordinate emergency response activities and business continuity plans.
	Manage contractors and vendors to ensure quality service delivery and contractual compliance.
	Identify operational risks and implement appropriate mitigation measures.


Qualifications


	Bachelor's Degree in Engineering (Electrical, Mechanical, Civil, or related discipline) or a closely related field.
	9–12 years of progressive experience in Facility Management, with significant experience managing integrated FM operations for corporate, industrial, or energy-sector clients.
	Demonstrated experience managing large multidisciplinary teams and high-value FM contracts.
	Strong knowledge of building systems, maintenance planning, engineering operations, and asset lifecycle management.
	Excellent leadership, communication, negotiation, and stakeholder management skills.
	Strong commercial awareness with experience managing budgets, contracts, and vendor performance.
	Sound knowledge of HSE standards and regulatory compliance within facility management operations.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite and Computerized Maintenance Management Systems (CMMS).


Professional Certifications:


	COREN registration will be an added advantage.
	IFMA Certification (FMP, SFP, CFM, or equivalent) will be an added advantage
    

    

        Click here to Apply

title: Operations Officer (Retail) Job at Kiyix Recruitment Hub
content:
At Kiyix recruitment hub, we help make recruitment a stress-free experience for both the employer and the potential job seekers Our goal at KIYIX RECRUITMENT AND MOTIVATION HUB is to help create one million jobs in Nigeria by 2030. We strive to help make businesses in Africa great by providing them with good staff and enabling the staff to become great.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Operations Officer (Retail)

Job Location: Victoria Island, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Industry: Pharmaceutical

Job Summary
     

            
    




	We are seeking a proactive and detail-oriented Operations Officer to oversee and coordinate the day-to-day operational activities of our client's pharmaceutical business.
	The ideal candidate will ensure operational efficiency, regulatory compliance, effective inventory management, and seamless coordination across departments to support business growth and excellent customer service.


Key Responsibilities


	Coordinate daily operational activities to ensure smooth business operations. - Monitor inventory levels and collaborate with relevant teams to prevent stock shortages or overstocking.
	Ensure compliance with company policies, pharmaceutical regulations, and operational procedures.
	Prepare and submit operational reports to management.
	Supervise and support staff to ensure productivity and adherence to standards.
	Coordinate with procurement, warehouse, sales, and other departments to achieve operational objectives.
	Identify operational challenges and recommend process improvements. - Monitor the maintenance of facilities, equipment, and operational resources. - Ensure accurate documentation and proper record-keeping.
	Perform other operational duties as assigned by management.


Requirements


	Bachelor's Degree (B.Sc.) or Higher National Diploma (HND) in Business Administration, Operations Management, Pharmacy, or any related field.
	Minimum of 2 years of experience in an operations role, preferably within the pharmaceutical, healthcare, or FMCG industry.
	Strong organisational and problem-solving skills.
	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite, particularly Excel and Word.
	Ability to work under pressure and manage multiple priorities effectively.
	High level of integrity, attention to detail, and accountability.


What We Offer


	Competitive salary of N200,000 – N250,000 (based on experience and qualifications).
	Opportunity for career growth and professional development.
	A supportive and professional work environment.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

Admin Officer Job at Bradfield Consulting Limited




        
    

        
        Bradfield Consulting Limited - Our client is a premier garment company established to create premium products to add value to its consumers and has a 25+ year history as the leading brand in Nigeria with retail operations in 11 stores across the country. The brand is renowned for exceptional craftsmanship and timeless appeal, catering to fashion-conscious parents who prioritize style and quality. It also owns a contract manufacturing outfit focused on the mass production of garments. The organization is seeking a visionary and execution

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Admin Officer

Job Location: Ilupeju, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

            
    




	We are seeking an organized Admin Officer to manage daily operations and ensure an efficient environment for patients and medical staff.
	You will handle patient coordination, medical records, and front-desk workflows.


Key Responsibilities


	Manage front desk, patient reception, and appointment scheduling.
	Maintain confidential patient files and medical databases.
	Handle correspondence with patients and HMO representatives.
	Coordinate clinic logistics and office supplies.
	Track staff attendance and shift schedules.


Requirements


	Education: National Diploma (ND) in Business Administration or related field.
	Experience: Minimum of 1 year in administration.
	Skills: Strong communication, multitasking, and problem-solving skills.
	Tech Skills: Proficient in Microsoft Office Suite.
	Traits: Proactive, honest, organized, and maintains a high level of confidentiality.


Salary
N160,000 monthly net.

Method of Application
